introSection: Fly Over Mediterranean is a steel roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Jinniu, Chengdu, Sichuan, China. Built by Intamin it is the third Mega-Lite roller coaster and the first of two Mega-Lite roller coasters to be built in the Happy Valley chain.
fullText:
Fly Over Mediterranean is a steel roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Jinniu, Chengdu, Sichuan, China. Built by Intamin it is the third Mega-Lite roller coaster and the first of two Mega-Lite roller coasters to be built in the Happy Valley chain.



Red track and green supports.
